The gross salary range for people working in Dominican Republic is typically from 9,935 DOP (minimum salary) to 34,819 DOP (highest average, actual maximum salary is higher). This is the total monthly salary including bonuses. Salaries can vary drastically among different job categories. Der Tourismus in der Dominikanischen Republik boomt in jüngster Zeit, und der Sektor ist eine der wichtigsten Beschäftigungsquellen des Landes.
